data/maps/OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F/te.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Trainer: That PC in the corner there is\nfor any POKéMON TRAINER to use.\pNaturally, that means you're welcome\nto use it, too.
data/maps/OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F/te.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Pokemon: POKéMON CENTERS are great!\pYou can use their services as much\nas you like, and it's all for free.\lYou never have to worry!
data/maps/OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F/te.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_CableCl: The POKéMON CABLE CLUB on the second\nfloor was built recently.\pBut they say they're still making\nadjustments.
data/maps/OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F/te.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_TradedI: The POKéMON CABLE CLUB on the second\nfloor was built recently.\pI traded POKéMON right away.
